creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 228393
v1

Proposing for /quarterly due to "Initial support for Quake 2021 re-release".

Builds fine with default and inversed options. Works fine on 12.2 i386 (SDL-2.0.12 under Xwayland) and 14.0 amd64 (SDL 2.0.17 under Sway 1.7). I don't use/play this port otherwise.
